[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] '''Markenson''' was in charge of the [[Wyloff system/Legends|Wyloff system]] [[External Communications]] facility. Markenson was relieved of duty following an investigation into security breaches at the installation.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' {{1stm}}
